title: Voyage embed() utility (standalone)
userStory: As a developer, I want a standalone embed() helper using Voyage so that ingest and recall can turn text into vectors without any graphiti coupling.
acceptanceCriteria: embed(texts: list[str]) -> list[vector] calls Voyage using the existing key and model (BRAIN_EMBED_MODEL)
Returns vectors of the dimension matching the chunks.embedding column
Batches multiple texts in one request where the API allows
Errors (auth, rate-limit, oversized input) are raised/surfaced, not swallowed
Verify: a smoke embeds two strings and asserts vector length and that distinct texts yield distinct vectors
